encounters.trigger: You hack the terminal, triggering the alarm system and forcing the drone to patrol your location.
Downing the drone alerts the security team, causing this enforcer to deploy a blast door lock.
encounters.hazard: Slippery oil slick on the floor

encounters.trigger: The death of the Enforcer initiates the emergency lockdown sequence, awakening the sentinel.

pickup.name: System Override Key
pickup.effect: Provides total control over the mainframe core.

output.objective: Infiltrate the mainframe, bypass the security protocols, and download the encrypted data.

boss.name: Chief Security Officer 'Ironclad'
boss.victory_condition: Use the System Override Key to deactivate Ironclad's cybernetic armor before dealing the final blow.

output.setting: The decaying underbelly of a mega-city skyscraper.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the alley activates the drone, blocking the path to the data terminal.
Accessing the terminal reveals the location of the core, spawning the bot.
The assassin materializes as the server farm initiates a lockdown sequence.

output.objective: Infiltrate the Core and prevent the temporal collapse.

boss.name: The Architect
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to destabilize The Architect's time-loop barrier.

encounters.trigger: Opening the dumpster reveals a datapad directing the player to the abandoned subway.

pickup.name: Bio-Luminescent Serum
pickup.effect: Increases vision and reveals invisible traps.

encounters.trigger: The crawler drags a severed fiber optic cable, which shorts out the security gate to the main reactor.

pickup.name: Hyper-Conductive Catalyst
pickup.effect: Charges throwing vials with static electricity.

encounters.hazard: Electrified puddles that pulse at irregular intervals.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the emergency protocol, sealing the doors and activating the primary boss.

pickup.name: System Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central core for the final confrontation.

encounters.hazard: Unstable containment fields that shrink the combat arena.

output.objective: Purge the sentient virus from the city's central mainframe.

boss.name: Aether-Prime Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Use the System Override Key to bypass the shield before striking.

output.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis infested with rogue AI and chemical spills.
output.reward: The source code to the city's neural network, granting control over all automated systems.

enemy.name: Corrupted Security Drone
enemy.weakness: High-frequency resonance from the Mono-Molecular Blade

encounters.trigger: Approaching the drone activates its target acquisition lock, forcing a confrontation to clear the path forward
encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage cables creating intermittent electrical arcs

enemy.name: Augmented Street Samurai
enemy.weakness: System stun from the EMP Grenade Module

encounters.trigger: Stealing the data chip from the drone's wreckage alerts the Samurai to your presence

pickup.name: Data Encryption Key
pickup.effect: Overrides security bulkheads and boss lair protocols

encounters.hazard: Toxic smog venting from broken subterranean pipes

enemy.name: Prototype Synth-Assasin
enemy.weakness: Malfunctioning processors due to the Data Encryption Key injection

encounters.trigger: Inserting the key into the server console initiates a forced system reboot, summoning the assassin

pickup.name: Neuro-Link Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Prevents catastrophic system failure during boss fight

encounters.hazard: Unstable flooring that collapses if you stand still for too long

output.objective: Infiltrate the Central Core and purge the rogue AI governing the city's power grid.

boss.name: Overmind Core Processor
boss.weakness: Physical corruption from the Neuro-Link Stabilizer
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Neuro-Link Stabilizer into the Core's primary port while dodging lethal laser grids

output.setting: The decaying undercity of Neo-Veridia, a sprawl of rust and flickering neon lights.
output.reward: Total control over the city's power distribution and freedom from corporate debt.

pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity against metallic armor.

pickup.effect: Stuns enemies and makes them reflective.

encounters.hazard: Flickering neon signs that temporarily blind the player.

encounters.trigger: Uploading the data drive triggers the system's final guardian.
encounters.hazard: Heavy rain that amplifies lightning attacks.

output.objective: Reboot the city's central weather mainframe before the concert starts.
